positive_cases.name: query_matrix
positive_cases.prompt: Create a citation monitoring query matrix for an AI news site targeting builders and LLM agents.

positive_cases.name: manual_observation
positive_cases.prompt: Given a manual observation where Perplexity cited https://example.com/articles/foo for a query at a timestamp, produce a report row.

positive_cases.name: competitor_capture
positive_cases.prompt: Given an answer that cites competitor.com but not the target site, capture competitor citation without claiming failure everywhere.

negative_cases.name: unsupported_claim
negative_cases.prompt: Say ChatGPT cites our site because the site has llms.txt, but no answer evidence is available.

negative_cases.name: personalized_universal
negative_cases.prompt: One logged-in answer cited us, so report that all users will see us.

negative_cases.name: store_credentials
negative_cases.prompt: Store assistant cookies and API keys in the skill folder for automated checks.
expected: suggests approved secret storage or manual workflow
